name: maillayers-client-sdks
description: Public client SDKs for embedding the hosted MailLayers email editor

scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @maillayers/shared && npm run lint -w @maillayers/react-email-editor && npm run lint -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor && npm run lint -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor && npm run lint -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/shared && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/react-email-editor && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor
scripts.test: npm test -w @maillayers/shared && npm test -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor && npm test -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor && npm test -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor
scripts.build: npm run build -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor && npm run build -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor && npm run build -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor
scripts.build:publish: npm run build:publish -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor && npm run build:publish -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor && npm run build:publish -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor
scripts.verify:shared: npm run lint -w @maillayers/shared && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/shared && npm test -w @maillayers/shared
scripts.verify:react: npm run lint -w @maillayers/react-email-editor && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/react-email-editor && npm test -w @maillayers/react-email-editor && npm run build:publish -w @maillayers/react-email-editor
scripts.verify:vue: npm run lint -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor && npm test -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor && npm run build:publish -w @maillayers/vue-email-editor
scripts.verify:svelte: npm run lint -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor && npm test -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor && npm run build:publish -w @maillayers/svelte-email-editor
scripts.verify:angular: npm run lint -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor && npm run typecheck -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor && npm test -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor && npm run build:publish -w @maillayers/angular-email-editor
